close_reason: Added Solidity options to devenv buck2.nix module
description:
Modify nix/devenv/turnkey/buck2.nix to:
- Build soldeps cell when solidity.enable = true
- Register cell in .buckconfig
- Handle soldeps-gen sync

Part of Solidity support (turnkey-ri2t).
title: Add Solidity cell handling to devenv buck2.nix
